conversionFocus: Lead with directions because location is verified and stronger than any unconfirmed digital route.

primaryCta.label: Get Directions
primaryCta.reason: Directions are the strongest truthful action in the current source set.

secondaryCtas.label: View Menu
secondaryCtas.reason: Menu access remains useful even when the source set is still light on external links.

secondaryCtas.label: Call
secondaryCtas.reason: Phone supports practical follow-up and pickup questions.

fallbackRules.when: A verified order link is missing
fallbackRules.reason: Do not fabricate an order path when the source set does not support it.
Keep the next step inside the landing page when no verified website exists.

recommendedSections.reason: The hero should immediately state the offer and local context.
Featured items are available and should surface early.
The offer has enough structure for a clean scan route.
Rating, proof points, or both are available as trust anchors.
Practical positioning and service modes help explain the business quickly.
Approved real images are available and should reinforce truthfulness.
FAQ can reduce first-visit friction when supported by actual answers.
The page should close with the strongest truthful action.
Footer reinforces contact and local trust signals.

messaging.heroFocus: South Indian restaurant, Paneer Potato Masala Dosa, Cork
messaging.trustFocus: 4.6 rating, 610 reviews, and repeated praise for very tasty food and friendly staff.
messaging.galleryFocus: Use approved real images and keep decorative filler out.
messaging.locationFocus: 35 Washington St, Centre, Cork, T12 DHX2.
